evidence: Paper introduces MAP-Elites algorithm adaptation for kernel optimization with kernel-specific behavioral descriptors
Paper introduces quality-diversity search approach for kernel optimization
Paper introduces meta-prompt evolution technique for co-evolving prompts with kernels
Paper generates GPU kernels as core output
Paper evaluates on KernelBench and robust-kbench benchmarks
Paper compares SYCL with Triton as cross-platform GPU programming model
Paper generates SYCL kernels as primary output and evaluates on SYCL benchmarks
Survey paper covering GPU kernel generation as the central topic
Paper surveys kernel benchmarks including KernelBench, TritonBench, MultiKernelBench, and others
Triton is a primary target language discussed throughout the survey for kernel generation
Paper systematizes SFT approaches for kernel generation including ConCuR/KernelCoder and KernelLLM
Paper systematizes RL approaches for kernel generation including Kevin, QiMeng-Kernel, AutoTriton, TritonRL, CUDA-L1/L2
Paper provides a four-dimensional taxonomy of agent-based kernel generation approaches
